name: Roller Booking MCP
description: MCP server for the Roller entertainment booking platform. Exposes product listings and availability for RollerBN.

authentication.description: Pass your Supabase anon key (or custom API key) in the X-API-Key header

tools.name: get_products
tools.description: Lists all bookable products from the Roller platform. Returns id, name, type, description, image_url, duration (minutes), tags, and variations (with price in cents, tax, groupSize, locations).

tools.name: get_product_availability
tools.description: Checks availability for a specific Roller product on a given date or date range. Returns available time slots and capacity information.

productId.description: The Roller product ID to check availability for

endDate.description: Optional end date in YYYY-MM-DD format for a range query

examples.query: What activities are available at RollerBN?
Show me things to do at RollerBN this weekend
Is there availability for laser tag on Saturday?
examples.description: Check specific product availability for a given date

examples.query: What time slots are available for mini golf next Friday?
examples.description: Query time slot availability for a specific experience

examples.query: How much does go-karting cost at RollerBN?
examples.description: Fetch product list and inspect variation prices
